arts.ttl: PSG predicted XI v OGC Nice: Luis Enrique to rotate ahead of Arsenal encounter
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain’s attention is fixed on Tuesday’s UEFA Champions League encounter against Arsenal and as a result, Luis Enrique is expected to rotate his side against OGC Nice on Friday. …

arts.ttl: OGC Nice predicted XI v PSG: Evann Guessand to start, Dante out
arts.sum: OGC Nice will be without their captain, Dante, for their trip to face Paris Saint-Germain at the Parc des Princes on Friday. Franck Haise also confirmed Tanguy Ndombélé’s continued absence…

arts.ttl: OGC Nice without Tanguy Ndombélé and Dante for PSG trip
arts.sum: As expected, OGC Nice will be without Tanguy Ndombélé and club captain Dante for the trip to Paris Saint-Germain on Friday night. Dante did not feature in the 2-1 win…

arts.ttl: OGC Nice captain Dante ruled out of PSG encounter
arts.sum: OGC Nice captain Dante (41) has been ruled out of OGC Nice’s meeting against Paris Saint-Germain on Friday night with a knee issue, AFP understands. Dante also missed last Sunday’s match against…

PSG's 10-game winning run ended in midweek as they were held to a 1-1 draw with Nantes. Even so, the French side remain unbeaten in Ligue 1 this season, a record they'll feel confident about maintaini...
